items.title: Warren Buffett Warned That Insurance Companies’ ‘Only Products Are Promises.’ That Didn’t Stop Him From Buying 5,039,564 Shares of UnitedHealth Stock.
items.description: If you read Warren Buffett’s 1977 shareholder letter, you might be extra surprised by Berkshire’s decision to load up on UNH shares in Q2 2025.
